versions.name: Grizzly Base
versions.summary: Montana Council high-adventure base camp near Bigfork, situated 40 miles south of Glacier National Park and 5 miles north of Flathead Lake, serving as a launch point for unit-planned Bob Marshall Wilderness and Glacier adventures rather than basic Scout-camp programming.

provenance.notes: Imported from camp-finder; raw description and sessions dropped (operational data stays at the council site). The evergreen summary is original prose regenerated from that description, excluding dates/fees/schedules. camp_type classified from program_types.
